changesProposed.name: Founders Fund

verified.name: Founders Fund
verified.thesis: Founders Fund focuses on ambitious projects that resolve real challenges and create transformative technology. The firm has gradually developed from early-stage consumer internet into a primary backer of hard tech, defense technology, space exploration, artificial intelligence, and biotech.
verified.notes: Founded July 2005 by Peter Thiel, Ken Howery, and Luke Nosek. Raised Founders Fund Growth III at $4.6 billion in 2025 for late-stage investments. Wikipedia lists Ken Howery as founder but notes him as former partner; current senior partners confirmed on Wikipedia as: Peter Thiel, Luke Nosek, Mike Solana, Trae Stephens, Lauren Gross, Scott Nolan, Napoleon Ta.
